candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Two half-cells are set up as follows:
Half-Cell A: Strip of Cu(s) in $CuNO_3(aq)$
Half-Cell B: Strip of Zn(s) in $Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)$
When the cells are connected according to the following diagram, the following reaction occurs. If the $Cu^+ + e^- \rightarrow Cu(s)$ half reaction has a standard reduction potential of +0.52 V, what is the standard reduction potential for the $Zn^{2+} + 2e^- \rightarrow Zn(s)$ half reaction?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
两个半电池设置如下:

半电池A: 铜条(s)浸没在 $\ce{Cu(NO3)2}$ (aq)溶液中。
半电池B: 锌条(s)浸没在 $\ce{Zn(NO3)2}$ (aq)溶液中。

当两个半电池根据下图连接时,会发生以下反应:
$\ce{Cu^{2+}(aq) + 2e^- -> Cu(s)}$ (半反应A)
$\ce{Zn(s) -> Zn^{2+}(aq) + 2e^-}$ (半反应B)

已知半反应A的标准电极电位为 +0.52 V。若要求半反应B的标准电极电位,则选项为:

A. +0.76 V
B. -0.76 V
C. +0.24 V
D. -0.24 V
metadata.explanation_zh:
电池电势($E_{\text{cell}}$)等于还原电势($E_{\text{red}}$)与氧化电势($E_{\text{ox}}$)之和。

已知电池电势$E_{\text{cell}} = 1.28 \, \mathrm{V}$和还原电势$E_{\text{red}} = 0.52 \, \mathrm{V}$,可计算得到氧化电势$E_{\text{ox}} = 1.28 \, \mathrm{V} - 0.52 \, \mathrm{V} = 0.76 \, \mathrm{V}$。

另外,还原电势等于氧化电势的相反数,即$E_{\text{red}} = -E_{\text{ox}} = -0.76 \, \mathrm{V}$。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The diagram is readable and provides the essential missing information from the stem: the overall reaction and E°cell, so the task is understandable and solvable. However, the answer signal is inconsistent: the raw answer and the chemistry imply -0.76 V, while the normalized answer text drops the negative sign.
